docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUESSEY, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLURG, MAX SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
